title: UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd!
